name: X-Change Life
description:
UPDATE: LOREBOOKS ARE OUT, I'VE MADE A NEW VERSION HERE WITH A LOREBOOK

This is an attempt to make the pornographic game x-change.life (SUPER NSFW LINK) into a text adventure.

The premise is that you're a male character headed to the mysterious place known as Summer City. In it are pills called x-change pills which instantly and painlessly swap you to the opposite sex.

Instructions: make a persona with a male name, try to not include too much about their physical description since that can change. In the game you will swap from male to female as appropriate

The game deals with themes of smut, but has a lot of pregnancy related fluff. This version of it has mentions of pregnancy but it's not a major focus the way it is in the original game.

🚩 Content warnings: potential dubcon or noncon, possible forced feminization, pregnancy and breeding content. Extreme content is mostly avoidable so I opted not to put the dead dove on this one.

On the status section:

The status section should update each time your status changes. If it doesn't appear on its own send a message with the following string: [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section]

Don't be afraid to edit it too. Sometimes LLMs mess up

Update: Dec-18-2024: small modification to the status section to make it populate better
creator: Mysteras
